name: Wand of Enemy Detection
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 charge. For 1 minute, you know the direction of the nearest creature {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to you within 60 feet, but not its distance from you. The wand can sense the presence of {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creatures that are {@condition Invisible|XPHB}, ethereal, disguised, or hidden, as well as those in plain sight.
